nodes.name: Run Analytics
nodes.notes: Click to run all analytics queries

nodes.name: 📈 Top 10 Viral Videos
nodes.notes: Shows top performing content with full traceability

parameters.query:
-- Top 10 Viral Videos with Complete Breakdown
SELECT 
  c.title,
  c.url as posted_url,
  a.username as posted_by,
  m.views,
  m.likes,
  m.comments,
  m.shares,
  ROUND((m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100, 2) as engagement_rate,
  hv.hook_text,
  hp.pattern_name as hook_pattern,
  i.idea_text,
  cr.username as source_creator,
  sr.reel_url as inspiration_url,
  c.posted_at
FROM content c
JOIN accounts a ON c.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
LEFT JOIN hook_variants hv ON c.hook_variant_id = hv.hook_variant_id
LEFT JOIN hook_patterns hp ON hv.hook_pattern_id = hp.hook_pattern_id
LEFT JOIN ideas i ON c.idea_id = i.idea_id
LEFT JOIN source_reels sr ON c.source_reel_id = sr.source_reel_id
LEFT JOIN creators cr ON sr.creator_id = cr.creator_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY m.views DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Account Performance Summary (Last 30 Days)
SELECT 
  a.username,
  a.platform,
  a.niche,
  a.followers_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) as posts_last_30d,
  SUM(m.views) as total_views,
  SUM(m.likes) as total_likes,
  SUM(m.comments) as total_comments,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(m.views), 0) as avg_views_per_post,
  MAX(m.views) as best_video_views
FROM accounts a
LEFT JOIN content c ON a.account_id = c.account_id
LEFT JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE a.active = true
  AND m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY a.account_id, a.username, a.platform, a.niche, a.followers_count
ORDER BY total_views DESC
LIMIT 20;

nodes.name: 🎣 Hook Pattern Analysis
nodes.notes: Which hook patterns drive the most engagement

parameters.query:
-- Hook Pattern Performance Analysis
SELECT 
  hp.pattern_name,
  hp.description,
  COUNT(c.content_id) as times_used,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views,
  AVG(m.likes) as avg_likes,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate,
  MAX(m.views) as best_performance
FROM hook_patterns hp
JOIN hook_variants hv ON hp.hook_pattern_id = hv.hook_pattern_id
JOIN content c ON c.hook_variant_id = hv.hook_variant_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY hp.hook_pattern_id, hp.pattern_name, hp.description
HAVING COUNT(c.content_id) >= 3
ORDER BY avg_views DESC;

-- Best Performing Niches
SELECT 
  a.niche,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) as accounts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) as total_content,
  SUM(m.views) as total_views,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views_per_content,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate
FROM accounts a
JOIN content c ON a.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND a.niche IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.niche
ORDER BY total_views DESC;

nodes.name: 📹 Content Type Analysis
nodes.notes: Reels vs Videos vs Shorts performance

parameters.query:
-- Content Type Performance (Reels vs Videos vs Shorts)
SELECT 
  a.platform,
  c.content_type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views,
  AVG(m.likes) as avg_likes,
  AVG(m.comments) as avg_comments,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate
FROM content c
JOIN accounts a ON c.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY a.platform, c.content_type
ORDER BY a.platform, avg_views DESC;

nodes.name: 🌟 Best Source Creators
nodes.notes: Which creators inspire the best performing content

parameters.query:
-- Source Creator Analysis (Who inspires best content?)
SELECT 
  cr.username,
  cr.niche,
  cr.platform,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) as videos_created_from_this_creator,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views_our_content,
  AVG(sr.views) as avg_views_source_content,
  ROUND(AVG(m.views)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(AVG(sr.views), 0), 2) as performance_multiplier,
  MAX(m.views) as best_video_views
FROM creators cr
JOIN source_reels sr ON cr.creator_id = sr.creator_id
JOIN content c ON sr.source_reel_id = c.source_reel_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY cr.creator_id, cr.username, cr.niche, cr.platform
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) >= 2
ORDER BY avg_views_our_content DESC
LIMIT 15;

nodes.name: ⚠️ Underperforming Accounts
nodes.notes: Accounts below average engagement - need improvement

parameters.query:
-- Underperforming Accounts (Need Attention)
WITH avg_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100) as platform_avg_engagement
  FROM metrics_daily m
  JOIN content c ON m.content_id = c.content_id
  WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT 
  a.username,
  a.platform,
  a.niche,
  COUNT(c.content_id) as posts,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as account_engagement_rate,
  (SELECT ROUND(platform_avg_engagement::numeric, 2) FROM avg_metrics) as platform_avg,
  ROUND(
    AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100) - 
    (SELECT platform_avg_engagement FROM avg_metrics), 
    2
  ) as engagement_diff
FROM accounts a
JOIN content c ON a.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND a.active = true
GROUP BY a.account_id, a.username, a.platform, a.niche
HAVING AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100) < 
       (SELECT platform_avg_engagement FROM avg_metrics)
ORDER BY engagement_diff ASC
LIMIT 15;

nodes.name: 📊 Growth Trends (30d)
nodes.notes: Daily performance over the last 30 days

parameters.query:
-- Growth Trends (Last 30 Days)
SELECT 
  date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT content_id) as posts_published,
  SUM(views) as daily_views,
  SUM(likes + comments + shares) as daily_engagement,
  ROUND(AVG((likes + comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate
FROM metrics_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC;

-- Platform Comparison (Instagram vs YouTube)
SELECT 
  a.platform,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) as total_accounts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) as total_content,
  SUM(m.views) as total_views,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views_per_content,
  SUM(m.likes + m.comments + m.shares) as total_engagement,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate
FROM accounts a
JOIN content c ON a.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY a.platform
ORDER BY total_views DESC;

-- Idea Performance (Human-Approved Ideas)
SELECT 
  i.idea_text,
  i.human_feedback,
  i.status,
  COUNT(c.content_id) as times_used,
  AVG(m.views) as avg_views,
  AVG(m.likes) as avg_likes,
  ROUND(AVG((m.likes + m.comments)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(m.views, 0) * 100), 2) as avg_engagement_rate,
  MAX(m.views) as best_performance
FROM ideas i
JOIN content c ON i.idea_id = c.idea_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON c.content_id = m.content_id
WHERE i.status = 'approved'
  AND m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY i.idea_id, i.idea_text, i.human_feedback, i.status
ORDER BY avg_views DESC
LIMIT 15;
